name: Vaylantz Dominator Duke
name_jp: ヴァリアンツ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ドミネーター</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－デューク
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
If "Vaylantz World - Konig Wissen" is in a Field Zone or if you control a FIRE "Vaylantz" monster: You can Special Summon this card to your Main Monster Zone in its same column. You can only use this effect of "Vaylantz Dominator Duke" once per turn.

[ Monster Effect ] 
You can target 1 Set card in the Spell & Trap Zone; that Set card cannot be activated this turn (even if this card leaves the field). If this card in the Monster Zone moves to another Monster Zone: You can target 1 face-up monster in your opponent's Main Monster Zone; take control of that face-up monster, but it cannot declare an attack nor activate its effects, also it is treated as a "Vaylantz" monster. You can only use each effect of "Vaylantz Dominator Duke" once per turn.
pend_eff: If "Vaylantz World - Konig Wissen" is in a Field Zone or if you control a FIRE "Vaylantz" monster: You can Special Summon this card to your Main Monster Zone in its same column. You can only use this effect of "Vaylantz Dominator Duke" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can target 1 Set card in the Spell & Trap Zone; that Set card cannot be activated this turn (even if this card leaves the field). If this card in the Monster Zone moves to another Monster Zone: You can target 1 face-up monster in your opponent's Main Monster Zone; take control of that face-up monster, but it cannot declare an attack nor activate its effects, also it is treated as a "Vaylantz" monster. You can only use each effect of "Vaylantz Dominator Duke" once per turn.
eff: You can target 1 Set card in the Spell & Trap Zone; that Set card cannot be activated this turn (even if this card leaves the field). If this card in the Monster Zone moves to another Monster Zone: You can target 1 face-up monster in your opponent's Main Monster Zone; take control of that face-up monster, but it cannot declare an attack nor activate its effects, also it is treated as a "Vaylantz" monster. You can only use each effect of "Vaylantz Dominator Duke" once per turn.

action: Activates if moved to another Zone
Takes control of an opponent's monster
mst: Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Pendulum Zone
Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
